text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I haven't gotten the chance to speak with Admire Vega since her
tryout race, and it's been gnawing away at me.
choice_data_list: (I have to check up on her!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what hounds her as she runs, what lies in the chasm she
always seems to be peering into, or what burden weighs her down...
choice_data_list:
But I never will if I don't make the effort to find
out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While walking around campus looking for her, I spot her training
partner from the other day, Meisho Doto.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... Um, y-you want to know if I've seen Ayabe? Uhh, well... I-I guess I have seen her, but...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! If it is our disciple of the stars whom you seek, look
to the lofty peaks! Even now she proffers herself to the treacherous
slopes!
choice_data_list: So... she's in the mountains?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
In plebeian terms, yes! Or to really break it down, "She's gone for
some trail running!"

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Umm! I-I know I don't belong in your conversation, b-but if you know
where she is, you'll head there right away, won't you?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A-Ayabe has no problem whatsoever doing very high-level training...
and that's probably what she's doing now, so...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
S-so please don't go! The trails are way too dangerous for a regular
person...
choice_data_list:
I appreciate the concern, but that won't stop
me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let him go, Doto. For inside his head, already the bells of fate toll
their song. There is no stopping him.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let her go, Doto. For inside her head, already the bells of fate toll
their song. There is no stopping her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a hearty laugh, she tells me more precisely where I might find
Admire Vega.
choice_data_list: Thanks. See you around!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Wah, n-no turning back now...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe kept insisting on being alone ever since tryouts... Do you think
she'll be okay?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Some hold their ear to the door. Some brave a knock. And yet others
kick it down. I say let it be!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You came to speak with me?
choice_data_list: Yep.
Yep.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I have nothing to say. And I'm not accepting any scouting offers right
now, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, that didn't last long. But I'm here with a goal, and I'm going to
see it through!
choice_data_list: (Gotta catch up!)
(Gotta catch up!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...
choice_data_list: Huff... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Sigh...
choice_data_list: Hrk... Cough...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Meisho Doto did warn me, to be fair, but this trail is no joke! The gap between us widens and widens.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And it only gets worse...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I soldier on despite having lost sight of her, the sun sinks far below
the treetops.
choice_data_list: Can barely see... where I'm stepping... Whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tumble, crash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My senses gradually return, and I ease open my eyes to find... stars.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A sea of stars so vast I feel as if I might drown.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Are you hurt anywhere?
choice_data_list: Hm? Wait, Admire Vega?! What are you—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm the one asking the questions. Are you hurt anywhere?
choice_data_list:
I feel fine. I'm guessing I have you to thank for
that?

I feel fine. I'm guessing I have you to thank for
that?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I mean, not like I could just leave you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a long sigh, Admire Vega lets slip a question.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why do you care about me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
My tryout race was... You saw what happened. I don't know you, and
you barely know me either.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So... why?
choice_data_list: I don't know. But...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: But?
choice_data_list: I couldn't leave you alone.
I couldn't leave you alone.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'm fine being alone. Prefer it, even.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Running, winning... These duties I must bear alone. Because she... my
sister, she...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She gave her life in my stead.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I've said too much. Forget that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So that's the burden she carries. No doubt there's more to it, but one
thing is clear—she's determined to bear it alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Still...
choice_data_list: I won't let you be alone!
I won't let you be alone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My legs are killing me. It's a miracle my body can still move. But I'm
here now, just within reach.
choice_data_list: Will you let me be your trainer?
Will you let me be your trainer?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You really don't learn. Now what?
choice_data_list:
If you want to walk your path alone, that's fine
by me.

If you want to walk your path alone, that's fine
by me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
But that won't stop me from supporting you
every step of the way.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: What are you...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's curfew, so... I should go.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ayabe! Welcome back. ♪ Hey, check out this super fluffy—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but... I just want to sleep right now. I'm so... tired...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, um, oookay?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aw, look at Sleeping Cutie over here. Well, well, well... somebody had an extra-nice day.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I had a dream. And for the first time in forever... it was a pleasant
dream.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I was with her, the most adorable sister I've never seen, running
through a sea of stars, not a care in the world...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I hear a timid knock at my door and open it to find...
Admire Vega!
choice_data_list: Does this mean you're interested in my offer?
Does this mean you're interested in my offer?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I mean, I'll need a trainer to compete in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: So if I have to choose, then...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It might as well be you.
choice_data_list: Thanks. I promise you won't regret it.
Thanks. I promise you won't regret it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't seem particularly excited to have me, but, well, it's a
start.
